mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_message_room (created_datetime, updated_datetime) VALUES (now(), now())
INSERT INTO tbl_message_room_member (message_room_id, member_id) VALUES (#{messageRoomId}, #{memberId}) ON CONFLICT (message_room_id, member_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT mrm1.message_room_id FROM tbl_message_room_member mrm1 JOIN tbl_message_room_member mrm2 ON mrm1.message_room_id = mrm2.message_room_id WHERE mrm1.member_id = #{memberId1} AND mrm2.member_id = #{memberId2} AND mrm1.left_at IS NULL AND mrm2.left_at IS NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_message_room_member WHERE message_room_id = mrm1.message_room_id AND left_at IS NULL ) = 2 LIMIT 1

SELECT mr.id, ( SELECT CASE WHEN msg.deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL THEN '삭제된 메시지입니다.' ELSE msg.content END FROM tbl_message msg WHERE msg.message_room_id = mr.id ORDER BY msg.created_datetime DESC, msg.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message, ( SELECT msg.created_datetime FROM tbl_message msg WHERE msg.message_room_id = mr.id ORDER BY msg.created_datetime DESC, msg.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_message msg WHERE msg.message_room_id = mr.id AND msg.sender_id != #{memberId} AND msg.is_read = false AND msg.deleted_datetime IS NULL ) AS unread_count FROM tbl_message_room mr JOIN tbl_message_room_member mrm ON mr.id = mrm.message_room_id WHERE mrm.member_id = #{memberId} AND mrm.left_at IS NULL ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT m.id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.creator_verified, m.creator_tier, m.follower_count FROM tbl_message_room_member mrm JOIN tbl_member m ON mrm.member_id = m.id WHERE mrm.message_room_id = #{roomId} AND mrm.member_id != #{excludeMemberId} AND mrm.left_at IS NULL
